name: Chaos-swap bad mods (modify existing rare)
description: Your rare has the wrong mods. Chaos Orbs in PoE2 remove one random mod and add a different one — chip away at the bad mods until you land on usable rolls.

steps.outcome: Each Chaos Orb removes one random modifier and adds a new random one. Use repeatedly to phase out clearly bad mods. Bear in mind it can remove a good mod too — Chaos is not targeted by default.

notes_for_user: Use when the item has 2-3 mods you like and 2-3 you don't. The variance is real — sometimes Chaos removes your good mod. Set a budget. Advanced (highly recommended for this path): 'Omen of Whittling' targets the lowest-tier mod for removal, making Chaos almost deterministic — by far the most efficient way to scrub bad rolls. 'Omen of Sinistral Erasure' / 'Omen of Dextral Erasure' restrict removal to prefix-only or suffix-only.
